title: Blade's Temples
description: Adds 4 new Minecraft temples (jungle, dark forest, badlands, and plains) and 1 Palace(desert)
body:
# Welcome to Blade's Temples!

This Mod adds 5 new structures to the base game, without replacing existing structures to preserve the vanilla feel:
## The Desert Palace:
![The Desert Palace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/20d46qa1/images/a5082fc868d266f261d87adaae8b1685928903c5.png)
A Majestic palace that spawns in the desert.
Inside the Desert palace, you'll find the all-too-familiar purple concrete block in the middle. Mine it, and you'll fall the bottom section of the Palace, filled with loot! But beware, Palace Guards & Knights roam the halls, and will stop at nothing to defeat you.
<details>
<summary>Available Loot</summary>
The following can be found in chests, barrels, and decorative pots:
1. cooked_beef
2. stick
3. sandstone
4. emerald
5. cobweb
6. sand
7. rotten_flesh
8. arrow
9. gunpowder
10. redstone
11. bucket
12. ender_pearl
13. string
14. iron_ingot
15. diamond
16. golden_apple
17. enchanted_golden_apple
18. brick

(note that not all items can be found in pots or barrels, and certain items are rare)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Mobs</summary>
Palace Guardians:
In each temple there are 4 locations where OP loot chests generate, inside these spaces also spawns "Palace Guardians", each having 1 totem of undying, diamond armor, a diamond sword, 100 health points(50 hearts total), and can deal 5.0 base damage (2.5 hearts).

All throughout the bottom of the temple, there are also "Palace Knights", with a default health of 50 points(25 hearts), each having an iron sword, a mixture of armor(leather, chainmail, gold).
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Values</summary>
    "separation": 25,
    "spacing": 50,
    "blades-temples:desert/palace/palace"
</details>



## The Jungle Temple:
![The Jungle Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/20d46qa1/images/a340610d90fc92dda387069ec23527364e5a2755.png)
Hidden deep within the dense jungle, this rare and mysterious Jungle Temple awaits discovery. The upper level offers only minimal loot, a mere teaser of the treasures that lie beneath. But for adventurers seeking a greater challenge, flick the lever at the heart of the temple to unlock the hidden lower chamber.

Be on guard, near every lower chest is a trail spawner, capable of summoning swarms of new bogged creatures and relentless zombies. Only the brave and skilled will survive the trials and claim the temple's true riches!
<details>
<summary>Available Loot</summary>
The following can be found in chests and barrels: 
1. iron_pickaxe
2. iron_boots
3. iron_leggings
4. iron_chestplate
5. iron_helmet
6. skeleton_skull
7. stick
8. moss_block
9. bamboo
10. melon
11. iron_boots (enchanted)
12. iron_leggings (enchanted)
13. iron_chestplate (enchanted)
14. iron_helmet (enchanted)
15. emerald
16. diamond
17. cobweb
18. arrow
19. bone
20. golden_apple
21. enchanted_golden_apple
22. rotten_flesh
23. leather_boots
24. leather_leggings
25. leather_helmet
</details>
<details>
<summary>Mobs</summary>
  The trial spawners can spawn either bogged or zombies. These entities values have not been modified.
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Values</summary>
    "separation": 25,
    "spacing": 50,
    "blades-temples:jungle/temple"
</details>

## The Dark Forest Temple:
![The Dark Forest Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/20d46qa1/images/cf51e1d9820d6c70425b0ba982966c8d6adb97be.png)
The Dark Forest Temple spawns within the Dark Forests, obscured by the looming trees. Finding the Temple is a treat, and offers Tons of loot! But Beware of the TNT hidden below, otherwise you'll be in for an EXPLOSIVE surprise!
<details>
<summary>Available Loot</summary>
The following can be found in chests:
1. gold nuggets
2. iron nuggets
3. diamonds
4. gold ingots
5. iron ingots
6. dark oak leaves
7. dark oak logs
8. emeralds
9. dark oak saplings
10. wheat seeds
11. carrots
12. sticks
13. apples
</details>
<details>
<summary>Mobs</summary>
Doesn't naturally spawn mobs except in some dark areas.
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Values</summary>
    "separation": 25,
    "spacing": 50,
  "blades_structures:dark_forest/temple/temple"
</details>

## The Plains Temple:
![The Plains Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/20d46qa1/images/921ea7a830ca4090c7c1363c876d642ff9535a55.png)
A simple temple found within the plains biome. It contains varied loot, but beware of the darkness - in every dark area exists spawners - alongside naturally spawning mobs.
<details>
<summary>Available Loot</summary>
The following can be found in chests:
1. gold nuggets
2. iron nuggets
3. diamonds
4. gold ingots
5. iron ingots
6. oak leaves
7. oak logs
8. emeralds
9. oak saplings
10. wheat seeds
11. carrots
12. sticks
13. apples
</details>
<details>
<summary>Mobs</summary>
Contains Mob Spawners, spawning zombies. The dark spaces in this temple can also spawn other natural mobs.
</details>
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Values</summary>
    "separation": 20,
    "spacing": 35,
    "blades_structures:plains/temple/temple"
</details>


## The Badlands Temple
![The Badlands Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/20d46qa1/images/a847d021887cf0ef6b3ac44f5d195c33821e2090.png)
This new Temple(added in version 1.0.2 of the mod) naturally spawns inside the Badlands biome. The Chests and barrels are filled with LOOT!

If you want a fight and a chance to get a trial key, there's 2 pillager trial spawners pillagers on the bottom layer. 
<details><summary>Possible Loot</summary>
1. white_terracotta
2. orange_terracotta
3. magenta_terracotta
4. light_blue_terracotta
5. yellow_terracotta
6. lime_terracotta
7. pink_terracotta
8. gray_terracotta
9. light_gray_terracotta
10. cyan_terracotta
11. purple_terracotta
12. blue_terracotta
13. brown_terracotta
14. green_terracotta
15. red_terracotta
16. black_terracotta
17. dark_oak_planks
18. emerald
19. diamond
20. iron_ingot
21. gold_ingot, with functions: set_count (count: 3, add: true)
22. dead_bush
23. red_sand
24. cactus
25. gold_nugget
26. golden_apple
27. book, with functions: enchant_with_levels (levels: 30.0, options: 
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Values</summary>
    "separation": 25,
    "spacing": 50,
    "blades-temples:badlands/temple"
</details>

# FAQ:
  **Question:** Who created this mod?
  
  **Answer:** Me, SemiBlade.

  **Question:** Can I add this mod to a modpack?
  
  **Answer:** You have permission to add this mod to a modpack. As long as you give proper credit (such as a link to this page and giving the author, semiblade, proper attribution), without modification - and as long as the modpack resides on modrinth and/or curseforge.

  **Question:** Can I review this mod for my YouTube channel?
  
  **Answer:** You have permission to review, comment on, and criticize the mod/data pack, as long as proper credit is given and any download links are directed to the original source (for example, here on Modrinth).
  
  **Question:** Can I support the author?
  
  **Answer:** For now, downloading the mod is enough! Though I'd appreciate it if you tell your friends!

  **Question:** What if I have an Idea or issue?
  
  **Answer:** You can DM me, reply to my posts, or @ me here: https://x.com/SemiBlade

## Requirements:
The only required mod is "Fabric API"
https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
